dataset: NHANES 2011-2012 (National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey)

pi_items.source: Verified in SQL analysis of NHANES data dump
Verified in export_result.sh SQL query and metadata specification

pi_items.verified_value: sex = 'Male' AND DOB < '1960-01-01' AND DOB IS NOT NULL AND DOB != ''
pi_items.source: export_result.sh line 36 implements the full query with additional NULL and empty string checks

Parsed NHANES SQL dump (libreehr_nhanes.sql.gz from https://github.com/LibreHealthIO/lh-ehr/raw/master/sql/nhanes/libreehr_nhanes.sql.gz) and executed exact query: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM patient_data WHERE sex = 'Male' AND DOB < '1960-01-01' AND DOB IS NOT NULL AND DOB != ''
Parsed patient_data table from NHANES SQL dump showing 9,448 total patients with valid IDs and 9,390 with complete demographics
setup_librehealth.sh line 59 specifies this as primary source for NHANES data

setup_librehealth.sh comments (lines 4, 53-56) confirm real NHANES patient data; verified via CDC and LibreHealth Forums that NHANES 2011-2012 data was loaded into LibreHealthEHR for educational purposes

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on real NHANES (National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey) 2011-2012 patient data containing 9,448 total patients. The task requires agents to identify male patients born before January 1, 1960. The ground truth count for this filtered demographic (sex='Male' AND DOB<'1960-01-01' with non-null, non-empty DOB values) is 1,002 patients. The data is sourced from the official LibreHealthIO repository (https://github.com/LibreHealthIO/lh-ehr/raw/master/sql/nhanes/libreehr_nhanes.sql.gz) and is publicly available real data from the CDC's National Health and Nutrition Examination Survey.
